summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Forge AI coding assistant app. Backend API, frontend UI, and integration between components tested successfully. Core functionality working with some AI service budget limitations.

medium_priority_issues.issue: Image generation fails with 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.4330015, Max budget: 0.4'
medium_priority_issues.impact: Users cannot generate images with Nano Banana

medium_priority_issues.issue: Site cloning fails with SSL certificate verification error

flaky_endpoints.workaround: Video generation works but status polling can timeout

integration_issues.issue: AI responses may not immediately appear in UI due to timing/animation

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections
Auth redirect to workspace after registration
Workspace page loads with sidebar navigation
Chat/AI code assistant sends and receives messages
Video generation panel UI loads correctly
Image generation panel UI loads correctly
Site cloner panel UI loads correctly
Video generation with Sora 2 (when not timeout)

high_priority: Increase or remove budget limits for Emergent LLM API to enable image generation
Fix SSL certificate verification issues for site cloning functionality
medium_priority: Create test user credentials (test@forge.ai / testpass123) for easier testing
low_priority: Improve chat response timing/animations for better UX
